  have h2 : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 0.5) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) ≤ x^(-0.5:ℝ) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := by
    apply riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_mono
    · intro ρ hρ
      simp only [Set.mem_Ico, Set.mem_univ] at hρ ⊢
      exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
    · intro ρ hρ
      have hρ' : ρ.re < 0.5 := by
        simp only [Set.mem_Ico] at hρ
        linarith
      exact by
        gcongr
        all_goals linarith
  have h3 : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0.5 σ₁) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) ≤ (x^(σ₁ - 1) - x^(-0.5:ℝ)) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ico I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := by

    · intro ρ hρ
      simp only [Set.mem_Ico, Set.mem_univ] at hρ ⊢
      exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
    · intro ρ hρ
      have hρ' : ρ.re ≥ 0.5 := by
        simp only [Set.mem_Ico] at hρ
        linarith
      have hρ'' : ρ.re ≤ σ₁ := by
        simp only [Set.mem_Ico] at hρ
        linarith
      exact by
        gcongr
        all_goals linarith
  calc
    2 * (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 σ₁) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im))
      = 2 * (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 0.5) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) + riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0.5 σ₁) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im)) := by rw [Set.sum_union]
    _ ≤ 2 * (x^(-0.5:ℝ) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) + (x^(σ₁ - 1) - x^(-0.5:ℝ)) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ico I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im)) := by gcongr
    _ ≤ 2 * (x^(-0.5:ℝ) * (I.S₀ + I.B₁ I.T₀ T) + (x^(σ₁ - 1) - x^(-0.5:ℝ)) * I.B₁ I.H₀ T) := by

      · exact lemma_2_1 I (by linarith) (by linarith)
